introSection: Pyrenees (Japanese: ピレネー) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Parque Espana-Shima Spain Village in Shima, Mie, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: White track and light brown supports.

fullText:
Pyrenees (Japanese: ピレネー) is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Parque Espana-Shima Spain Village in Shima, Mie, Japan.



White track and light brown supports.






 * Pyrenees on the parks website (Japanese)
